# World Wonders Atlas

> A world atlas of natural, human-made, and mixed wonders with an interactive map, categories, descriptions, galleries, visited marks, and dream-board planning.

World Wonders Atlas is a travel discovery app for people collecting beautiful and meaningful places around the planet. The current atlas contains 2607 mapped places across natural, human-made, and mixed wonders, with labels such as UNESCO, Instagram Wonders, classic wonder lists, heritage cities, and endangered sites.

## Pages

- [World Wonders Atlas](/atlas.html): interactive atlas with 2607 wonders, map filters, place cards, visited tracking, and dream-board status.
